title: Annotated Pull Request Example
subtitle: Summarize findings, evidence, and reviewer focus.

sections.heading: Annotated Pull Request in use
sections.body: This demo shows how a review handoff can lead with actionable findings while still giving maintainers the file paths, evidence, and validation state they need.

cards.title: P1: Gallery links were inert
cards.body: Template cards looked like navigation but lacked hrefs, so keyboard and pointer users could not open examples.

cards.title: P2: Demo content was generic
cards.body: Several outputs only described the renderer contract instead of demonstrating the template itself.

cards.title: P2: Light palette drifted warm
cards.body: The portable token layer now mirrors VPK/ADS white surfaces and neutral text values.

rows: Cards include relative hrefs to output pages
Light mode uses white surfaces and ADS-like neutrals

sections.heading: Validation notes
items: Static HTML checks pass for each generated output.
Generated pages include dark tokens but open in light mode by default.
Representative outputs include inline SVG, diagrams, controls, tables, editor JSON, and print sections.
